## Task 3.7 Report

**Status:** Complete — Phase 3 finished.

- `C:/work/mega/astramemory-plugin/package.json` — version 0.2.0 → 0.3.0
- `C:/work/mega/astramemory-plugin/README.md` — purged ApiKey, documented Bearer flow + auth.json cache, added SubagentStop row, updated config table with new env vars
- `C:/work/mega/astramemory-plugin/CHANGELOG.md` — created with v0.3.0 Keep-a-Changelog entry (Breaking / Added / Changed)

**Grep verification (README):**
- `apikey|memory_api_key` (case-insensitive): **No matches** in body.
- Remaining `CORTEX_API_KEY` mention at line 160 is inside the historical "Migrating from cortex plugin" section — preserved per task instructions.

**Test suite:** `node --test tests/*.test.mjs` → **20/20 pass** (16,053 ms duration). All FEAT-172 M3 scrub/retry/payload/auth tests still green.

**Commit:** `b305bb7` on `feat/transcript-ingest` — "chore(release): v0.3.0 — transcript ingest + Bearer-only auth" — 4 files, 65 insertions, 26 deletions.

**Self-review checklist (all green):**
- Both manifests at 0.3.0
- No ApiKey/MEMORY_API_KEY in README body
- MEMORY_BEARER + export contract documented
- auth.json cache locations (POSIX + Windows) preserved
- SubagentStop in hooks table with 12-turn / MEMORY_SUBAGENT_MAX_TURNS
- CHANGELOG follows Keep-a-Changelog (Breaking / Added / Changed sections)
- Test suite green
- Commit touches exactly 4 files

**Notes:**
- `.claude/` directory remains untracked (intentional — not part of this commit).
- Git emitted CRLF/LF warnings on all 4 files (Windows checkout, normal — not a failure).
- Plugin is now ready for plugin-only verification. Server-side `/ingest/transcript` endpoint work is tracked in another repo and out of scope here.
